headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Expedia Group, Lowers Price Target to $303
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Ken Gawrelski   maintains Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $307 to $303.
